ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport (e.g., hockey, basketball, football) */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league (e.g., NHL, NBA, NFL) */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the game is played */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the referee officiating the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the sport */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sport record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sport record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the league */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the league */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the league record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the league record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current coach of the team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_outcomes" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "team1_score" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "team2_score" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game went to overtime */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties in the game */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game outcome record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game outcome record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_odds" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "team1_odds" REAL /* Odds of the first team winning */,
  "team2_odds" REAL /* Odds of the second team winning */,
  "over_under" REAL /* Over/under score */,
  "bookmaker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bookmaker providing the odds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the betting odds record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the betting odds record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_odds_bookmaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("bookmaker_id") REFERENCES bookmakers ("bookmaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "team1_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the first team */,
  "team2_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the second team */,
  "team1_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the first team */,
  "team2_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the second team */,
  "team1_assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the first team */,
  "team2_assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the second team */,
  "team1_turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers by the first team */,
  "team2_turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers by the second team */,
  "team1_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls by the first team */,
  "team2_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls by the second team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game stats record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game stats record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the venue record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the venue record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the referee record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the referee record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookmakers" (
  "bookmaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmaker */,
  "bookmaker_name" TEXT /* Name of the bookmaker */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the bookmaker */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bookmaker record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bookmaker record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookmaker_id")
)
